Comfort, safety and performance

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mystic+ is our new two-liner EN-C glider. Designed for the true EN-C pilot. It offers a balance of comfort, safety and performance.

In comparison to the original Mystic, it has 10 extra cells, a new airfoil and a design focus entirely on pure performance.

Mystic+ delivers beautiful handling and efficiency. It features a new shark nose airfoil with a completely redesigned section and bottom camber. 

Due to the Mystic+ compact aspect ratio and lightweight two-liner rear riser steering, it creates an unmatched connection between pilot and wing, making it feel like an extension of the pilot’s body. This is one of the Mystic’s most special qualities and features. It truly allows the pilot to focus more on the conditions rather than keeping the glider open.

Tailored for X-Alps-type competitions and the SRS series in mind. Mystic+ is a true racing machine while remaining an ideal everyday glider. Its lightweight yet durable construction incorporates smart material choices. Built with Skytex 27g Classic 2 and Nitinol rods.

The material choices on the Mystic + enhance both performance and ease of packing and also provide effortless inflation, making tricky launches more manageable.
Whether soaring for leisure or pushing the limits in competition, Mystic+ offers a blend of efficiency, ease of use and top performance.

The design goal of the Mystic+ is to give pilots a wing where they can focus entirely on the air and their next move, ultimately feeling like the Mystic+ is an extension of their body. We believe we truly achieve this with this glider.

EN C 2-LINER

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”40px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/2-LINER-EN-C-1.png” title_text=”2 LINER EN C (1)” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||34px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”||||||||” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

A 2-liner layout is the ideal line configuration in a perfomance paraglider, offering a balance of efficiency and ease of use for intermediate to advanced pilots. This technology significantly enhances the glider’s performance and handling. Improving several key aspects, including:

  • Reduced drag for better glide
  • Greater control during accelerated flight
  • Improved overall efficiency
  • Higher top-end speed
  • Increased stability at all speeds

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”50px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

MYSTIC SHARK NOSE

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”40px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Flow-Mystic-plus-Shark-Nose-Airfoil-1.png” title_text=”Flow Mystic plus Shark Nose Airfoil (1)” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”40px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”||||||||” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mystic + has a new dedicated Shark Nose airfoil.

This Shark Nose airfoil was designed for enhanced glide, speed and efficiency. It optimises pressure distribution across the span, allowing for a more refined trim configuration that gives better overall performance in climb and glide.

This airfoil is still exceptionally resistant to collapse, allowing the pilots to push hard and achieve true performance with the Mystic+

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”50px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

3D CUT OPTIMIZATION AND ADVANCED SAIL TENSIONING

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”40px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/3D-CUT-AND-SAIL-OPTMISATION-1-scaled.jpg” title_text=”3D CUT AND SAIL OPTMISATION (1)” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||34px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”||||||||” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Mystic + is designed to be a lightweight yet durable glider, with internal geometry carefully designed to provide optimal structural support without adding unnecessary weight. Each panel and diagonal has been precisely sized and analyzed using advanced computer modeling to achieve the perfect balance of chord and span -wise sail tension. This meticulous design minimizes spanwise distortion, resulting in a canopy that feels tighter and more responsive. The sail’s flex characteristics are finely tuned to deliver ideal feedback.

A well-tensioned sail is essential for giving pilots the precise feedback needed to understand the surrounding air dynamics. This is especially important when flying through thermals, where detecting subtle changes in lift and sink is key to finding and staying in the core for longer.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”50px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

NEW RACING ARC

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”40px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/MYSTIC-arc-1.jpg” title_text=”MYSTIC arc (1)” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||34px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”||||||||” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Mystic +’s ARC design was created to blend excellent handling, high performance and line efficiency in perfect harmony. It offers exceptional roll authority, making thermaling and centering in lift easier. With increased aerodynamic washout near the tips, it optimizes the glide and improves roll stability at higher speeds. This innovative arc inspired by our high-performance gliders, delivers a performance-driven experience while reducing line consumption. All without sacrificing the Mystic’s signature smooth handling.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” module_id=”colours” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”50px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

excerpt.rendered: TECHNICAL DATA TECHNOLOGY COLOURS DOWNLOADS Comfort, safety and performanceMystic+ is our new two-liner EN-C glider. Designed for the true EN-C pilot. It offers a balance of comfort, safety and performance. In comparison to the original Mystic, it has 10 extra cells, a new airfoil and a design focus entirely on pure performance. Mystic+ delivers beautiful […]
